title: Improve static demo editor ergonomics
description: The static demo editor panel now has a draggable width handle, line numbers, a top-positioned Render button, and a simplified demo header label.
decision_notes: The demo page is an editing surface, so the source editor needs resizable width and line-number orientation.
Render was moved to a small top toolbar so the action remains reachable without scrolling to the bottom of the editor.
The header was simplified from the implementation-detail subtitle to a plain demo label.
verification: Browser DOM check on examples/demo.html: hasLineNumbers=true, hasResizeHandle=true, renderParentClass=panel-top, title=demo
